title: Huang Yu
content:
Huang Yu
  is a short old man from the Refining Feather Sect. He entered the Demon Spirit Land because he was being chased and hunted by his enemies. After arriving, he decided to stay in the Demon Spirit Land as it was safer for him, provided he was careful. Despite being a mid-stage Ascendant cultivator, his origin soul possessed a power very different from the celestial guardians, making him cautious about the use of soul search spells against him
